userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who made the recording

vibe.description: The primary emotional tone of the recording (e.g. Calm, Anxious, Excited, Fatigued)

vibeScore.description: The numeric score of the vibe intensity, from 1 to 10

summary.description: A 1-sentence explanation of the emotional state

transcript.description: The full transcribed text of the recording

recordings/{recordingId}.description: Vibe recordings and emotional tracking history
